purpose: Browser-first vertical-slice visual roles. Current humans are temporary stylized bases with authored wrappers, not final high-fidelity character art.

sky_system.notes: Generated by VisualDirector: sky color, sun disc, cloud planes, fog and zone lighting.

grass_material.notes: Generated in-game as batched multimesh grass blades with zone-tuned color.

road_cobble_material.notes: Generated in-game as layered rough stone road material for Greyfen.

mud_road_material.notes: Generated in-game as wet dark road material for Wychwood.

player_human.notes: Phase 1G uses the existing textured Warrior OBJ as a stronger fantasy protagonist base. Runtime adds cloak, harness, armor plate, boots, hood, contact shadow, and weapon presentation.

sister_anwen_human.notes: Phase 1G uses the existing textured Cleric OBJ as a shrine-priestess base. Runtime adds robe fall, gold stole, prayer cord, hood, staff, amulet, and contact shadow.

mira_human.notes: Temporary casual female base body. Runtime adds face markers, hair, cloak, belt, and herbalist color styling.

rook_human.notes: Phase 1G uses the existing textured Rogue OBJ for a more distinct smuggler silhouette. Runtime adds dark cloak, dagger, hood, belt, and face markers.

villager_human.notes: Phase 1G uses the existing textured Monk OBJ for more grounded robed villagers. Runtime adds role-readable clothing overlays, belts, aprons, veils, and face markers.

ghoulkin_creature.notes: Uses existing mapped creature until a higher-fidelity ghoul model is supplied.

bog_wretch_creature.notes: Uses existing mapped creature until a higher-fidelity bog monster is supplied.
